headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 29, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 1-0 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Nick Martinez earning the win. Jonathan Aranda led the Rays' offense with a single that plated the game's only run. In other action, the St. Louis Cardinals took down the Pittsburgh Pirates 11-7, with Ryan O'Hearn leading the charge at the plate. The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired 2B Tyler Fitzgerald in a trade with the Toronto Blue Jays.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries. The Miami Marlins placed RHP Pete Fairbanks on the 15-day injured list due to nerve irritation. The Minnesota Twins placed RHP Garrett Acton on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 26, 2026, with a right shoulder strain. The Athletics placed 3B Max Muncy on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 26, 2026, with a left fifth metacarpal fracture.

The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired 2B Tyler Fitzgerald in a trade with the Toronto Blue Jays, while the Toronto Blue Jays received cash in return. The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings. The Colorado Rockies traded 3B Nicky Lopez to the Chicago Cubs for cash.

top_news.title: **Rays Shut Out Guardians in Low-Scoring Affair**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 1-0 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Nick Martinez earning the win. Jonathan Aranda led the Rays' offense with a single that plated the game's only run.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Orioles in 3-5 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles took down the Houston Astros 3-5 in a closely contested matchup. Brice Matthews led the Orioles' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance, including a key single that scored Dustin Harris.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Reds in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run, 4-RBI performance.

top_news.title: Cardinals Take Down Pirates 11-7
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a convincing 11-7 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Ryan O'Hearn leading the charge at the plate. O'Hearn finished with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs, while Kyle Leahy earned the win with 5.1 innings pitched, 7 strikeouts, and 3 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Marlins RHP Pete Fairbanks Lands on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Pete Fairbanks, the Miami Marlins' right-handed pitcher, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to nerve irritation.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire Tyler Fitzgerald in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have acquired 2B Tyler Fitzgerald in a trade with the Toronto Blue Jays. The Blue Jays received cash in return.
